channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Canada sues Google claiming ‘near-total control’ of online ads
item.description: Canada’s antitrust watchdog said Thursday it was suing Google over its alleged anticompetitive conduct in online advertisements.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Australian Parliament bans social media for under-16s with world-first law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US police departments put EV patrol cars to the test
item.description: Some local police departments are considering moving to electric vehicles to bolster their fleet of patrol vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Keleigh Beeson, NewsNation

item.title: Australia passes first-ever social media ban for people under 16
item.description: Australia has passed a first-ever social media ban for youth, barring children under the age of 16 from using the platforms. The Australian Senate passed the legislation Thursday night with bipartisan backing.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Haberman says Zuckerberg's Mar-a-Lago visit a signal industry may be courting Trump
item.description: National political correspondent Maggie Haberman said Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's recent visit to President-elect Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort may show that industries are seeking to build a bridge with Trump ahead of the inauguration, and not the other way around.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, The Hill

item.title: Uber branches out into AI data labeling
item.description: Uber no longer offers just rides and deliveries: It’s created a new division hiring out gig workers to help enterprises with some of their AI model development work.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The outlook is uncertain for AI regulations as the US government pivots to full Republican control
item.description: The federal government is about to transition from one that prioritized safeguards for artificial intelligence to one more focused on eliminating red tape.
item.dc:creator: Dan Merica And Ali Swenson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 10 steps to smarter Google account security
item.description: There are important accounts to secure, and then there are important accounts to secure. Your Google account falls into that second category, maybe even with a couple of asterisks and some neon orange highlighting added in for good measure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel’s $7.9B subsidy deal comes at a high price for the chipmaker
item.description: Intel’s $7.86 billion subsidy agreement with the US government imposes strict conditions on the company’s ability to divest stakes in its chipmaking division if the unit becomes independent.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Matt Gaetz Turns to Cameo After Withdrawal from Congress
item.description: Former Florida representative Matt Gaetz joins celebrity video message app Cameo after withdrawing his name from consideration for President-elect Donald Trump's attorney general amid sexual misconduct allegations.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: How Biden’s AI tech could play a role in Trump’s immigration crackdown
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump will return to power next year with a raft of technological tools at his disposal that would help deliver his campaign promise of cracking down on immigration—among them, surveillance and artificial intelligence technology that the Biden administration already uses to he
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Amazon's $4B bet on an AI startup
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lauren Boebert Cameo page disappears amid House ethics concerns
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) briefly offered videos on Cameo, a website on which public figures sell personalized videos to fans, before the page went offline amid questions about whether it would have violated House ethics rules.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, The Hill

item.title: Ask the CIO: Defense Commissary Agency
item.description: Learn how agencies are advancing their cybersecurity posture in today’s complex threat landscape. The post Ask the CIO: Defense Commissary Agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Windows Recall is now available to test in limited preview
item.description: After a series of delays, Microsoft’s Windows Recall feature is now available in a limited preview for Copilot+ PCs.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NetBox Labs launches tools to combat network configuration drift
item.description: NetBox Labs is expanding its network management platform this week with a pair of new products designed to tackle the growing challenges of infrastructure documentation and configuration management.
item.dc:creator: Network World
